languages.text: "Не придавайте этому значения. Ювенна всегда беспокоится, такова ее природа. Девочка выросла среди знати и приучена мыслить интригами, и во всем сомневаться. В этот раз она убеждена, что мне стоит пойти на сделку с Диодасом ради династии. Но Ювенна не понимает, что с агрессорами нельзя вести переговоры. Порой, решение лежит на поверхности, и сейчас это решение — война! Должно быть, недавнее увлечение биографией святой Эланы сбивает ее с толку и заставляет мыслить идеалистично".

traits.locale_text: "Не придавайте этому значения. Ювенна всегда беспокоится, такова ее природа. Девочка выросла среди знати и приучена мыслить интригами, и во всем сомневаться. В этот раз она убеждена, что мне стоит пойти на сделку с Диодасом ради династии. Но Ювенна не понимает, что с агрессорами нельзя вести переговоры. Порой, решение лежит на поверхности, и сейчас это решение — война! Должно быть, недавнее увлечение биографией святой Эланы сбивает ее с толку и заставляет мыслить идеалистично".

languages.text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

В этот раз она убеждена, что мне стоит пойти на сделку с Диодасом ради династии. Но Ювенна не понимает, что с агрессорами нельзя вести переговоры. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

"Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

languages.text: “不必在意。尤文娜总是爱操心，她生性如此。那丫头从小在贵族圈里长大，习惯了阴谋算计，对一切都充满怀疑。这一回，她认定我该为了王朝与阿夫·伊拉蒙达成交易。可她不明白，绝不能跟侵略者谈判。有时答案就摆在眼前，而今天，这个答案就是战争！她近来痴迷于圣埃拉娜的生平传记，估计脑子都被搞糊涂了，满脑子都是些不切实际的念头。”
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: “不必在意。尤文娜总是爱操心，她生性如此。那丫头从小在贵族圈里长大，习惯了阴谋算计，对一切都充满怀疑。这一回，她认定我该为了王朝与阿夫·伊拉蒙达成交易。可她不明白，绝不能跟侵略者谈判。有时答案就摆在眼前，而今天，这个答案就是战争！她近来痴迷于圣埃拉娜的生平传记，估计脑子都被搞糊涂了，满脑子都是些不切实际的念头。”

languages.text: « N'y prenez pas garde. Juvenna est pétrie d'angoisses, c'est dans sa nature. Ayant grandi parmi la noblesse, elle est habituée à ce que tout le monde complote, raison pour laquelle elle se méfie de tout et de tous. En l'occurrence, elle est convaincue que je devrais passer un marché avec af Irramon dans l'intérêt de la dynastie. Mais ce qu'elle ne comprend pas, c'est qu'on ne transige pas avec son agresseur. Parfois, la réponse est évidente, et aujourd'hui, cette réponse, c'est la guerre ! Sa récente fascination pour la vie de Sainte Elana doit lui embrouiller les idées et lui farcir le crâne d'idéaux utopiques. »
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: « N'y prenez pas garde. Juvenna est pétrie d'angoisses, c'est dans sa nature. Ayant grandi parmi la noblesse, elle est habituée à ce que tout le monde complote, raison pour laquelle elle se méfie de tout et de tous. En l'occurrence, elle est convaincue que je devrais passer un marché avec af Irramon dans l'intérêt de la dynastie. Mais ce qu'elle ne comprend pas, c'est qu'on ne transige pas avec son agresseur. Parfois, la réponse est évidente, et aujourd'hui, cette réponse, c'est la guerre ! Sa récente fascination pour la vie de Sainte Elana doit lui embrouiller les idées et lui farcir le crâne d'idéaux utopiques. »

languages.text: "Buna bir önem atfetmek gereksiz. Juvenna daima endişelidir, doğası böyle. Soylular arasında büyüdü. Entrikalar üzerine kafa yormaya ve her şeyden şüphe duymaya alışkın. Bu vesileyle hanedanlığın iyiliği için af İrramon ile anlaşma yapmam gerektiğine ikna olmuş durumda. Fakat Juvenna, saldırganlarla asla pazarlık yapılmayacağını anlamıyor. Bazen ortada apaçık bir cevap vardır, bugün bu cevap savaş! Son zamanlarda Azize Elana'nın yaşam öyküsüne duyduğu hayranlık aklını karıştırıyor, kafasını idealist düşüncelerle dolduruyor."
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: "Buna bir önem atfetmek gereksiz. Juvenna daima endişelidir, doğası böyle. Soylular arasında büyüdü. Entrikalar üzerine kafa yormaya ve her şeyden şüphe duymaya alışkın. Bu vesileyle hanedanlığın iyiliği için af İrramon ile anlaşma yapmam gerektiğine ikna olmuş durumda. Fakat Juvenna, saldırganlarla asla pazarlık yapılmayacağını anlamıyor. Bazen ortada apaçık bir cevap vardır, bugün bu cevap savaş! Son zamanlarda Azize Elana'nın yaşam öyküsüne duyduğu hayranlık aklını karıştırıyor, kafasını idealist düşüncelerle dolduruyor."

languages.text: «No le dé importancia a eso. Juvenna siempre está preocupada, es su naturaleza. La muchacha creció entre la nobleza y está acostumbrada a ver conjuras por todas partes y dudar de cualquier cosa. En esta ocasión, cree que debería llegar a un acuerdo con af Irramon por el bien de la dinastía, pero Juvenna no entiende que no se puede negociar con el agresor. A veces, la respuesta es evidente, ¡y en este caso es la guerra! Su reciente fascinación con la vida de santa Elana debe de haberle llenado la cabeza de ideales».
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: «No le dé importancia a eso. Juvenna siempre está preocupada, es su naturaleza. La muchacha creció entre la nobleza y está acostumbrada a ver conjuras por todas partes y dudar de cualquier cosa. En esta ocasión, cree que debería llegar a un acuerdo con af Irramon por el bien de la dinastía, pero Juvenna no entiende que no se puede negociar con el agresor. A veces, la respuesta es evidente, ¡y en este caso es la guerra! Su reciente fascinación con la vida de santa Elana debe de haberle llenado la cabeza de ideales».

languages.text: "Das hat nichts zu bedeuten. Juvenna ist ständig besorgt, so ist sie nun mal. Das Mädchen ist unter Adeligen aufgewachsen und daran gewöhnt, überall Intrigen zu sehen und alles zu bezweifeln. In diesem Fall ist sie überzeugt, dass ich zum Wohle der Dynastie ein Abkommen mit af Irramon treffen sollte. Aber Juvenna versteht nicht, dass man mit Aggressoren niemals verhandelt. Mitunter ist die Antwort offensichtlich, und heute lautet sie Krieg! Ihre jüngste Faszination für die Biografie der Heiligen Elana scheint sie zu verwirren und mit idealistischen Gedanken zu erfüllen."
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: "Das hat nichts zu bedeuten. Juvenna ist ständig besorgt, so ist sie nun mal. Das Mädchen ist unter Adeligen aufgewachsen und daran gewöhnt, überall Intrigen zu sehen und alles zu bezweifeln. In diesem Fall ist sie überzeugt, dass ich zum Wohle der Dynastie ein Abkommen mit af Irramon treffen sollte. Aber Juvenna versteht nicht, dass man mit Aggressoren niemals verhandelt. Mitunter ist die Antwort offensichtlich, und heute lautet sie Krieg! Ihre jüngste Faszination für die Biografie der Heiligen Elana scheint sie zu verwirren und mit idealistischen Gedanken zu erfüllen."

languages.text: 「そんなことは気にしない。ユベナはいつも心配している、それが彼女の性質だ。彼女は貴族の中で育ち、策略を考え、すべてを疑うことに慣れている。今回は、王朝のためには、イラモンと取引すべきだと確信している。しかし、ユベナは、侵略者とは交渉しないことを理解していない。時には答えは明らかで、今日は戦争だ！最近、聖エレーナ伝記に夢中になっているせいで、理想的な考えに頭がいっぱいになっているのだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Attach no importance to that. Juvenna is always worrying, it is her nature. The girl grew up among the nobility and is accustomed to thinking in schemes and doubting everything. On this occasion, she is convinced that I should strike a deal with af Irramon for the sake of the dynasty. But Juvenna does not understand that you never negotiate with an aggressor. Sometimes the answer is obvious, and today that answer is war! Her recent fascination with Saint Elana's biography must be confusing her, filling her head with idealistic thoughts."

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことは気にしない。ユベナはいつも心配している、それが彼女の性質だ。彼女は貴族の中で育ち、策略を考え、すべてを疑うことに慣れている。今回は、王朝のためには、イラモンと取引すべきだと確信している。しかし、ユベナは、侵略者とは交渉しないことを理解していない。時には答えは明らかで、今日は戦争だ！最近、聖エレーナ伝記に夢中になっているせいで、理想的な考えに頭がいっぱいになっているのだろう。」
